description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and a mix of black and white exterior walls. The front includes a covered carport with a parked vehicle, a small green lawn, and an outdoor seating area with a table and chairs. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to a private courtyard with lush greenery. The rear and side facades are more minimal, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The house appears to have a single story, with a clear separation between living spaces and utility areas. The overall aesthetic is clean, functional, and contemporary, suitable for an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, black and white exterior, carport, and private courtyard. Features large windows, outdoor seating, and a minimalist, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport with a vehicle, outdoor seating area, and large windows opening to a green courtyard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white exterior, carport, garden with sunflowers, and visible interior spaces through large windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with a mostly solid white wall, minimal windows, and a glimpse of the interior courtyard greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with black exterior, multiple windows, and visible curtains, emphasizing privacy and interior separation.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered carport, large glass door, and minimal steps, with a clean, open approach and no decorative columns.
